name: hdim-remotion-video
description: HDIM Product Demo Video - Remotion Project

scripts.render:all: npm run render:60s && npm run render:90s && npm run render:120s
scripts.build: npm run render:all && npm run copy:videos
scripts.docker:render:90s: docker compose run remotion-renderer npm run render:90s
scripts.docker:render:60s: docker compose run remotion-renderer npm run render:60s
scripts.docker:render:120s: docker compose run remotion-renderer npm run render:120s
scripts.ssr:render:all: npm run ssr:render:60s && npm run ssr:render:90s && npm run ssr:render:120s

author: HDIM Team
